## Summary

Highly results-driven DevOps Engineer and certified Scrum Master with 10+ years of comprehensive experience across infrastructure, systems administration, and complex data environments.

Proven ability to pivot technical skills, currently focusing on the Microsoft Azure ecosystem and Infrastructure as Code (IaC). Expertise includes developing and maintaining automation workflows using Ansible within Azure DevOps for a "Database as a Service" offering.

Holds key certifications including Microsoft, Oracle and Professional Scrum Master™.

Dedicated team player with exceptional soft skills, ready to leverage deep technical insight and Agile discipline to drive robust, scalable cloud and CI/CD solutions in a dedicated Azure Engineer/DevOps role.

<br>

## Experience

### DevOps Engineer / Scrum Master

2020 - currently working here

[ING Hubs Poland](https://inghubspoland.com)

My project within ING Hubs Poland is Database as a Service within a Private Cloud. We provide Oracle Database service for ING Bank units.

Our team is responsible for monitoring Oracle Databases on Exadata. We are using Oracle Enterprise Manager Cloud Control.
We are responsible for the application part - EMCC, Weblogic, and Oracle Database repository (OMR). For process automation, we are using Azure DevOps (Pipelines).

From the start of my work in this role, we as a team - implemented two major upgrades of EMCC and DB, and discovered over five officially reported bugs to Oracle Support, automated almost all routine maintenance processes.

Skills I am using and pumping in this role:

- Provisioning and maintenance of Oracle EMCC, Weblogic, OMR, DataGuard, RMAN
- Provisioning and maintenance of Oracle EMCC host Agents
- Azure DevOps - Repos (Git), Pipelines (Ansible)

My personal goals are promotion from Middle to Senior grade and Employee of the Year award in 2021.
